original_image_tags: The image shows the reverse side of a document page. The paper is aged, off-white, with visible creases and two punch holes at the top. Faint bleed-through of text from the front side is visible. The primary content consists of several stamps and handwritten markings in blue and red ink.

elements.description: Multiple blue ink stamps and handwritten annotations on the back of a document. Visible stamps include: 'REC'D-COHR & IOUKS MAY 5 1:55 PM '69', 'REC'D-COHR & IOUKS MAY 5 3:31 PM '69', and 'MR. JONES MAY 6 2:34 PM '69 RECEIVED FBI'. A small red stamp reads '12 MAY 6'. Faint, illegible typed text is visible from the reverse side.

judge.reason: Both agree on the core visual content of blue ink stamps and handwritten annotations on the back of a document, but Description B provides specific quoted stamp text that Description A does not mention, creating an informational imbalance without direct contradiction.
